hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely a thinking/planning process and never produces an actual clinical note. There is no final output to evaluate for hallucination, but the lack of any completed note means it fails fundamentally.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process with no completed clinical note. The instructions required returning ONLY the completed note, and instead the output is an endless internal reasoning loop.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced. All transcript content is missing from any final output.
missed_items: family history of sister losing toe

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured internal reasoning.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was performed as no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains an extreme amount of duplicated reasoning, with the same line about marking diabetes in the Assessment section repeated hundreds of times in an apparent infinite loop.
